roles.definition: Integration role for adapting one interface, contract, or system shape to another.
Registry indexing role for stable anchor/address tokens used for deterministic references.
Documentation role for point-in-time audit and reconciliation findings.
Quality-support role for benchmark artifacts used to evaluate performance characteristics.
Concern-core role for local UI structure and content construction.
Concern-style role for style/layout rules paired to build concern structure.
Registry indexing role for bounded inventories/listings without runtime resolution execution.
Architecture-support role for command-line entrypoints and command surface orchestration.
Integration role for outbound system clients that consume external interfaces.
Architecture-support role for stable contract boundary definitions, parsing/normalization, and shape guards.
Data-model role for explicit data transfer object shape boundaries.
Surface-system role for runtime entry composition points.
Quality-support role for deterministic fixture artifacts.
Integration role for boundary gateways coordinating calls across external/internal systems.
Documentation role for recurring health/status checks.
Architecture-support role for structural host/composition and placement orchestration.
Registry indexing role for stable identifier constants/tokens/key sets for bounded targets.
Registry indexing role for canonical index surfaces.
Concern-core role for static knowledge/config/schema/reference data.
Concern-core role for interaction/state/behavior logic.
Registry indexing role for manifest/list artifacts that enumerate bounded payload membership.
Integration role for deterministic mapping between source and target representations.
Quality-support role for mocks and stubs used in isolated testing.
Documentation role for forward-looking planning artifacts.
Documentation role for governance and rule-setting decisions.
Registry indexing role for canonical registry payload surfaces.
Integration role for deterministic resolution across bounded candidate sets.
Concern-core role for result-layer output shaping/mapping/preparation.
Concern-style role for style/layout rules paired to results concern outputs.
Surface-system role for runtime route and path dispatch composition.
Data-model role for schema authority and deterministic shape declarations.
Documentation role for canonical specification/contract references.
Quality-support role for deterministic test artifacts.
Registry indexing role for token vocabularies used by deterministic interpretation routines.
Data-model role for type declarations and typed shape boundaries.
Historical pre-current concern split role retained for detection and migration guidance.
Architecture-support role for integration glue connecting modules/contracts/adapters.
Documentation role for repeatable procedural routines and sequences.
